description: Reveals and amplifies 1 enemy weakness — +20% damage from that type for 2 turns
Targeted strike — bonus +10 power if weakness was previously scanned
+15% accuracy to self and all allies for 2 turns
Coordinated attack — +5 power per active ally in battle
Previews opponent next action before decision phase
Precision strike — +50% damage if opponent action was predicted
Creates a temporary +15% defense barrier lasting 2 turns
Converts enemy defense value into attack power for this hit
Marks target — all sources deal +25% damage to marked target for 2 turns
Guaranteed hit against marked targets — cannot miss or be dodged
Elevated privileges — +30% to all stats for 1 turn
Disables 1 enemy ability for 3 turns — locked out of their hand
Blocks up to 30 damage this turn — excess damage passes through
Counter-attacks for 100% of damage blocked last turn
-30% accuracy to all enemies for 2 turns
Prevents enemy from using abilities costing more than 3 coherence for 2 turns
Reveals all traps and grants +15% evasion for 2 turns
Precise hit — +30% crit chance if terrain was mapped this battle
Slows target by 40% for 2 turns
Triple-hit attack — 12 power each hit — 36 total if all connect
+40% software defense for 2 turns
Ignores all software defenses — direct damage to core
Copies 1 ability from opponent hand — usable for 2 turns
Type auto-shifts to exploit enemy weakness — always hits soft spot
